flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Palm Beach State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Palm Beach State College rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (64.0% → 71.2%).
